item.text: I’ll add a focused regression test for the unresolved-review round-limit path first, verify it fails, then gate the completion prompt on `findings_resolved`.

The controller currently calls `ask_feature_completion` unconditionally for `ReviewComplete`. I’m adding a workspace test where the reviewer still reports findings at the configured round limit and asserting that the yes/no prompt is absent.

This unresolved path can be reproduced with `with_max_review_rounds(1)`: the first reviewer response is `FINDINGS`, the loop stops, and `ReviewResult::findings_resolved` is false. I’m adding that test now.
I’m running the new regression test before changing the implementation to confirm it fails on the reviewed bug.

item.text: The new test fails as expected because unresolved review results still emit the completion question. I’m gating the prompt on `ReviewResult::findings_resolved` now.
The controller now only asks the completion question for resolved reviews. I’m rerunning the focused regression and existing success-path tests.

item.text:
Fixed the unresolved-review edge case.

`WorkLeafController` now only asks the patch-agent “Is this feature done?” question when `ReviewResult::findings_resolved` is true: [src/workspace.rs](/tmp/work-leaf-3feature-worktree-bench.I4zIug/worktrees/feature-3/src/workspace.rs:717). I added a regression test that reproduces the round-limit `FINDINGS` path and verifies no close prompt is emitted: [tests/workspace.rs](/tmp/work-leaf-3feature-worktree-bench.I4zIug/worktrees/feature-3/tests/workspace.rs:345). The new test failed before the fix and passes now.

Validation passed:
- `cargo fmt`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- `cargo test --all-targets --all-features`
- Real Codex smoke returned `WORK_LEAF_REAL_AGENT_OK` after `thread.started`.
